data.title: Anastasia Beverly Hills completes recapitalization with CEO's $225 million equity investment, backed by lenders and TPG.
data.description: Anastasia Soare, the Founder and CEO, has injected $225 million in equity into ABH. The beauty brand, Anastasia Beverly Hills, successfully completed a recapitalization deal with full backing from its lenders and TPG. This move has led to a substantial decrease in the company's financial liabilities, marking a significant step towards its financial stability.

data.title: Vito Lee of Granite MENA is shaping cross-border investments for APAC in the Middle East tech hub, South Korea.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on December 24, 2025, the Middle East is quickly becoming a prominent tech hub on a global scale. Vito Lee, the APAC Partner of Granite MENA, is leading the way in reshaping cross-border investments. Lee is shifting away from the conventional agency approach, bringing about changes in the sector. This move comes amidst the Middle East's increasing prominence in the tech industry, with significant implications for the global economy.

data.title: Edgewise Therapeutics completes Phase 2 study for EDG-7500 in Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy with positive safety results.
data.description: During the CIRRUS-HCM trial, which featured interim safety findings from Part D, it was observed that EDG-7500 demonstrated good tolerability overall. There were no significant decreases in left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) or heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) observed. This indicates promising results in terms of safety and cardiac function.

data.title: White Mountains Insurance Group, Ltd. announces final results of "modified Dutch auction" tender offer expiring on Dec 19, 2025.
data.description: Bermuda-based White Mountains Insurance Group, Ltd. (NYSE: WTM) disclosed the outcomes of its recent "modified Dutch auction" tender offer. The offer, which ended on December 19, 2025, at midnight EST, concluded with the final results being unveiled.

data.title: Snowflake in talks to acquire Observe; part of AI acquisition spree. Deal in consideration amid growing interest in tech acquisitions.
data.description: Snowflake is currently in discussions to acquire the startup Observe as part of its ongoing artificial intelligence purchase streak. This potential deal marks another strategic move by Snowflake in the AI sector.

data.title: Microsoft aims to dispel doubts by leveraging AI for growth in 2026, receiving positive analyst reports amid skepticism.
data.description: This week, Microsoft received positive feedback from analysts amid doubts about its AI investments. Analysts predict that Microsoft will showcase significant growth driven by artificial intelligence by the year 2026, challenging skeptics.

data.title: Sanofi acquires Dynavax for $2.2B at $15.50/share, boosting its adult immunizations portfolio. Dynavax stock surges.
data.description: Pharmaceutical company Sanofi has announced its acquisition of vaccine manufacturer Dynavax Technologies for $2.2 billion, valuing each share at $15.50. This deal will bolster Sanofi's portfolio in adult immunizations. Following the news, Dynavax's stock experienced a significant surge in value.

data.title: El Salvador's Bitcoin plan faced reality in 2025 with the IMF, after 4 years of adoption strategy.
data.description: In 2021, El Salvador embarked on an ambitious initiative to adopt Bitcoin as a legal tender. Fast forward to 2025, and this strategy reached a pivotal moment when facing scrutiny from the International Monetary Fund (IMF).

data.title: GeeLark revolutionizes social media automation beyond post scheduling, changing the landscape in 2025.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in Singapore, a significant shift in social media automation was noted. Traditionally, automation in social media focused on scheduling posts using tools that helped plan content, publish at the right times, and monitor performance. However, the landscape has evolved, with new trends emerging in the field.

data.title: Faraday Future stock (FFAI) rose as its Middle East subsidiary partnered with RAK Innovation City for AI, Web3, and digital economy projects.
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) witnessed a boost in its stock value on Wednesday following the announcement that its Middle East subsidiary has signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with RAK Digital Assets Oasis, also referred to as RAK Innovation City. The outlined agreement focuses on cooperation in three main areas: artificial intelligence (AI), Web3, digital economy, and embodied intelligence. Through this partnership, Faraday Future and RAK Innovation City intend to establish research and innovation centers collectively. They aim to leverage their technological capabilities, industrial resources, and ecosystem advantages to conduct research, testing, and practical applications in AI, embodied intelligence, and Web3 specifically within the UAE. The collaboration's ultimate goal is to develop an industrial ecosystem oriented towards the future. This news and further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
